creator: santhosh.raju@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 204323
Patch to upgrade the ports script to support din-42 builds.

DIN Is Noise has been updated from version 41 to version 42.

I have made a patch that makes changes to the ports script to support building din-42.

It would be nice if the patch can be applied to the ports tree of FreeBSD.

Thank you
Santhosh
